name: oclient
description: Desktop OCPP-J client for testing BootNotification exchanges.
author: ForbiddenR

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist/main/index.js file:dist/preload/index.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.renderer.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.test.json
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
